meta.title: The CCP Is the Cause of Deterioration of US-China Relations
meta.description:
Chinese Transcript: https://s3.amazonaws.com/media.hudson.org/Episode+3+-+Chinese+Transcript.pdf

English Transcript: https://s3.amazonaws.com/media.hudson.org/Episode+3+-+English+Transcript.pdf

Hudson Institute China Center presents episode three of "Evening Chats with Mike Pompeo: A Message to the Chinese People." In this series, seventieth US Secretary of State Michael R. Pompeo speaks directly to the Chinese people about the Chinese Communist Party and US-China relations.

In this episode, Pompeo explains how the Chinese Communist Party is the cause of deterioration of US-China relations. He remarks that our relationship extends far further than the founding of the CCP, and that America has long wanted friendship with China. Despite the United States’ attempts at friendship, Pompeo explains that the CCP has consistently been a source of aggression towards Americans, its neighbors, and above all its own citizens. 

Learn more at https://www.hudson.org/policycenters/48-china-center
